finding: Cause: erosion of sigmoid plate / thrombophlebitic spread via emissary veins

differentials.name: Subdural empyema Route:   communication through intact bone and dura with vessels in subarachnoid space + brain parenchyma
differentials.raw: Subdural empyema Route:   communication through intact bone and dura with vessels in subarachnoid space + brain parenchyma

differentials.name: meningismus, focal neurologic deficits, focal seizures
differentials.raw: meningismus, focal neurologic deficits, focal seizures

context: Location:   (commonly) sigmoid + transverse sinus √  sinus of low attenuation on NECT and CECT √  absence of normal flow void on spin-echo MR √  no flow-related enhancement on gradient-echo MR √  occlusion on MRV DDx:   aberrant arachnoid granulation Location:   along posterior interhemispheric fissure; tentorium cerebelli √  widening of extracerebral space √  compression of adjacent sulci Rx:   prompt neurosurgical drainage
